name: AEON Headquarters
desc: The Headquarters of the Arbeits-und Erziehungsorgan der Nation (National Ministry for Work and Education) or more commonly known as AEON. A goverment agency of the Nation, its primary duty is to oversee the education and the wellbeing of the Nation's labor force. Less spoken out loud is its various 'vocational' facilities operated on every planet under control of the Nation. Unlike most other agencies within the Nation's goverment, it operates a large amount of armed Protektor Replika units. Officially they are used as support to the gestalt (human) workforce under its purview, they primarily used to control, supress or intimidate the citizens of the Nation.

name: AEON Facility
desc: A facility overseen by the Arbeits-und Erziehungsorgan der Nation (National Ministry for Work and Education) or more commonly known as AEON. Although considered a 'vocational work facility', this expansive facility has rather austere living conditions for its gestalt (human) workers. Officially these facilities are vocational work facilities but for many members of the Nation, these are esseitnally work camps for the unwanted, the political dissident or problematic people. Its not unheard of for people to dissapear in these camps.

name: VEB Rotfront Hydroponiks
desc: A series of hydroponics farms and food processing factories dotting the planet. Although part of the food supply chain, several of these production sites do not mass produce basic foodstuff but rather produce consumer goods that provide comfort food or items for the moral of the populance as well as for export. Volkseigener Betrieb Rotfront Hydropinik is known to produce a variety of items such as cigarettes, soft drinks, beer and candy

name: Rotfront Array
desc: A series of radio towers, transmitter dishes and receivers spread across several square kilometers. Although normally the Nation would use the space relay, the Rotfront Array is seen as a secondary site vital for survivable communications in case of an enemy raid disabling the primary communications relay.

name: Volksarmee Defense Coordination Center
desc: During the war against the Empire, the Nation built hundreds of large cannons designed to defend Vineta from orbital assault. Since then the Nation has embarked on a modernization program to fully intergrate and coordinate the various gound defenses though a single command center. Any hostile force seeking to violate the sovereignty of the Nation will have to contend with a powerful, networked ground defense system.
